description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code for security vulnerabilities on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a weekly schedule. Run the analysis in a ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions and repository contents, and write permission for security events. Analyze C++ code using CodeQL, checking out the repository with submodules, initializing CodeQL tools, building with make, and then performing the CodeQL analysis.
